title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 620.1066 - Rulemaking procedure
text:
620.1066.  Rulemaking procedure. — The department of economic development is authorized to adopt, promulgate, amend or repeal any rules or regulations necessary to carry out the provisions of sections 620.1045 to 620.1081.
(L. 1994 H.B. 1248 & 1048 § 9, A.L. 1995 S.B. 3)
